summary:
The patient’s prolonged but non-prolonged morning stiffness, lack of joint swelling, and presence of bony deformities consistent with osteophyte formation support an osteoarthritic process rather than rheumatoid arthritis. Normal inflammatory markers further confirm exclusion of seropositive autoimmune disease.  

\boxed{C}

\boxed{C}. Answer choice: C
